channel.title: Trackpad on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Trackpad on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Mac Beach Balls & Trackpad Freeze: Diagnosis and Fix
item.description: Ben Lovejoy uncovers why Macs show beach‑ball cursors and unresponsive trackpads, offering a step‑by‑step fix and exploring the broader impact on users today.
